title: Setup outsourcing cost per month
excerpt: I have my main table lookin like in the image, with each role and its rate & calculated cost per task, I want to have some kind of setup that will show me what is my monthly cost (for each month of the year, not average)…

posts.author: NoamToledano (Noam Toledano)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have my main table lookin like in the image, with each role and its rate & calculated cost per task, I want to have some kind of setup that will show me what is my monthly cost (for each month of the year, not average), preferably with a per role cost as well.
how could I a chive this setup?

image1551×103 15.3 KB

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @NoamToledano

I wonder if the Dashboards could be a good option for you here?
Dashboards allow you to create custom reporting using a number of widgets.
You can then filter your dashboard to only show a specific date range, such as a month. This would allow you to get live reporting on your monthly cost and spending.

You can read more on this in the resources below!
The Dashboards
The Chart Widget
Basic reporting with monday.com
Advanced reporting with monday.com

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’re welcome @NoamToledano!

If you find the resources helpful, please don’t forget to mark it as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Dani

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
